templates.title: GENERATING
templates.whenToUse: A cinematic showreel where the work was AI-generated: scroll-snap full-screen beats, each showing the prompt then the result denoising in.
templates.signature: Each image resolves from noise with a lime render scan-line; prompt as architectural-scale type; query-reticle cursor.

templates.title: ORBIT (v3)
templates.whenToUse: A landing where a hero 3D object (your real .glb) floats in a particle-lit WebGL space, then scrolls into a gallery below.
templates.signature: Three.js textured model + spectrum particle field + bloom + mouse-parallax, gated to the hero for performance.

templates.title: BENTO (v2)
templates.whenToUse: A scannable multi-asset gallery with varied tile sizes, the developing-frame reveal, and a standby rail.
templates.signature: Broken-grid bento with per-modality accent hues and a developing-photo reveal on scroll.

templates.title: PLAYHEAD
templates.whenToUse: A sequenced set of full-bleed media (year-in-review, generation timeline, portfolio progression) you scrub left-to-right like a video playhead.
templates.signature: A fixed gold scrubber turns vertical wheel into eased horizontal travel; the visitor IS the playhead, with a NN/NN HUD and stroked chapter indices.

templates.title: QUERY
templates.palette: two-color near-black + electric cyan; media supplies color
templates.whenToUse: A reel/portfolio that reads like prompting a model: a minimal monochrome typographic index you query with the cursor (rows reveal their asset on hover, click to lock).
templates.signature: Cursor-driven floating reveal that lags with velocity tilt and a trailing cyan shadow; non-queried rows dim.

templates.title: THE VERMILLION PRESS
templates.whenToUse: An editorial/art-journal landing with giant variable serif sharing the canvas with one big asset per spread; a light-mode contrast to dark templates.
templates.signature: Oversized Fraunces variable type whose weight deforms to scroll rhythm; type overlaps media via exclusion blend.

templates.title: PROVENANCE
templates.whenToUse: Present finished AI media to a client as a reverent old-master museum exhibition, giving each output art-historical weight.
templates.signature: Each work in a gilt frame with a spotlight pool and aged varnish; an engraved museum placard reveals on a slow intersection.

templates.title: SPACE (Mood Wall)
templates.whenToUse: An immersive showreel where you fly the camera through floating framed works in 3D Z-space, advancing on scroll.
templates.signature: Framed media planes in depth with reflective floor; scroll advances the fly-through; clean 2D fallback on mobile.

templates.title: STDOUT
templates.whenToUse: A developer/CLI-native audience: frame the work as a beautiful control-room where each render prints to stdout beneath the exact command that produced it.
templates.signature: $ commands with real flags + a live stats strip; the output prints below the command. Monospace throughout.

templates.title: MORPH
templates.palette: two-color near-black + one accent; media inside the type
templates.whenToUse: A type-as-interface studio hero where giant words morph and react, with the media revealed inside/behind the letterforms.
templates.signature: Huge variable letters react to scroll and cursor; media shows through the type. (Best seen live; kinetic.)

templates.title: ARC
templates.palette: one bold accent + chromatic arc cold->warm->hot
templates.whenToUse: Tell a progression story (raw to refined, draft to final) where the page color temperature heats up cold to warm to hot as you scroll.
templates.signature: Full-bleed beats whose palette shifts cold-warm-hot as a felt narrative ladder; headline-scale type.

templates.title: SPOTLIGHT NOIR
templates.whenToUse: A gallery felt as discovery: work hidden in a black stage, revealed only where the viewer's cursor light falls; click to lock and bloom.
templates.signature: A warm tungsten spotlight (GPU-composited shade) follows the cursor; only the lit work reads; the locked piece blooms to full clarity.

templates.title: FILM STRIP
templates.whenToUse: A cinematic reel where each asset is a frame on a literal 35mm strip you scrub left-to-right like a cutting-room timeline.
templates.signature: Sprocket-holed celluloid strip with Kodak edge codes + 24fps timecode HUD; the centered frame enlarges and plays.

templates.title: LIQUID
templates.whenToUse: A studio/agency hero where 3-6 full-bleed works ARE the navigation and the liquid morph between them is the brand identity.
templates.signature: A WebGL displacement shader ripples the work toward the pointer and morph-dissolves between pieces; clean CSS crossfade on mobile.

templates.title: RASTER WERK
templates.whenToUse: A disciplined print-grade poster series or asset index on a hard 12-col grid with oversized numerals and one accent color.
templates.signature: Difference-blend stamped index numerals anchoring flat primary-color plates on a strict modular grid with registration marks.

templates.title: DEPTH
templates.whenToUse: A reel where each piece sits in real dimensional layers - the room moves with scroll and pointer for a floating, diorama feel.
templates.signature: Foreground, midground, work, and background move at different rates so works float in dimensional space; pure CSS transforms.

templates.title: CUT & PASTE
templates.whenToUse: Present AI works as a raw hand-pasted photocopied zine (torn paper, tape, halftone, marker) instead of clean editorial gloss; scrolling flips the issue.
templates.signature: Washi-tape scroll-progress strip; torn-paper, tape-pinned cut-outs paste down on scroll with a folio page counter.

templates.title: CHROME COVER FLOW
templates.whenToUse: Show a curated reel one cinematic hero at a time with 3D depth; drag, scroll, or arrows flip through angled cards with a reflection.
templates.signature: Pure-CSS preserve-3d cover flow: flat-forward centered card with a reflection, side cards fanned on the Y-axis with depth-of-field blur.

templates.title: ISSUE
templates.whenToUse: A work archive where every piece deserves its own newsstand cover - masthead, cover lines, barcode, full-bleed hero; snap-scroll flips the issue.
templates.signature: Oversized Fraunces masthead bled across the top + floating cover-line kickers + a per-issue accent + a seeded SVG barcode.

templates.title: DRAFTING TABLE
templates.whenToUse: A precise technical portfolio or index where each piece is framed and dimensioned like an engineering drawing, hairlines drawing on scroll.
templates.signature: Hairline SVG draws itself (stroke-dashoffset) framing and dimensioning each work like a part on a blueprint, with spec callouts.

templates.title: SIGNAL DECAY
templates.whenToUse: An edgy digital-decay reel where works arrive and depart via datamosh: RGB split, scanline tear, block displacement, I-frame smear.
templates.signature: RGB channel split + scanline + block displacement + I-frame smear on each transition with a persistent VHS shimmer; reduced-motion = clean cuts.

templates.title: DIPTYCH
templates.whenToUse: Show a clear quality jump between two versions of the same subject (local vs hosted, draft vs final); the side-by-side comparison carries the narrative.
templates.signature: A sticky RAW/REFINED split where the glowing accent seam auto-sweeps on scroll and is pointer-draggable for hand comparison; oversized labels.

templates.title: ATELIER CANVAS
templates.whenToUse: Present a body of work as an explorable spatial workspace (mood board) you pan and zoom, rather than a scrolling page.
templates.signature: A transform-layer pan/zoom board with works pinned spatially, curved connector wires, sticky notes, a live minimap, and cluster-zoom pills.

templates.title: RING CAROUSEL
templates.whenToUse: Orbit a small set of works around a rotating CSS-3D cylinder spun by drag, scroll, or keys, where only the front panel plays.
templates.signature: A slowly rotating CSS-3D cylinder: the front panel sharp + amber-lit + the only one decoding/playing, neighbors curving away in perspective.

templates.title: ONE KEY (Manifesto)
templates.whenToUse: A reading-first manifesto/long-read where each work is an inline captioned figure that masks in as you reach it; the opposite of a flashy reel.
templates.signature: A centered Newsreader reading column with a vermilion drop-cap, margin footnotes, oversized pull-quotes, and a folio that renames per movement.

templates.title: BOOT
templates.whenToUse: An animated boot sequence where a BIOS-style screen loads each asset, then the work fills the screen with a CRT power-on flash.
templates.signature: BIOS init lines + a progress bar load each asset, then a CRT power-on flash; scanlines + screen-curvature vignette; rhythmic module-by-module.

templates.title: GOLDEN HOUR
templates.palette: five real-clock bands: pre-dawn indigo, sunrise amber, midday bone, golden-hour vermilion, night navy
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio whose ambient mood should track the visitor's real local time of day while the works themselves stay constant.
templates.signature: A fixed living sky (gradient + sun + stars + horizon) and every card's cast-shadow angle driven by the visitor's real clock, with a draggable corner clock-face that scrubs any hour; pure CSS variables, no WebGL.

templates.title: THE PROVENANCE FILES
templates.archetype: FOIA redacted dossier, hover to declassify
templates.palette: manila #d8cdb4 over near-black, stamp red #a01b14 / blue #1f3a63, declassified green #2f8f3e
templates.whenToUse: A showcase that frames each work as a classified exhibit you declassify, doubling as a clean provenance-transparency story.
templates.signature: Hover, click or tap a black redaction bar to wipe it away with a clip-path dissolve and flash a green DECLASSIFIED stamp, tracked by a live redactions-remaining counter and a DECLASSIFY ENTIRE FILE button.

templates.title: CONSTELLATION
templates.archetype: works as nodes in a navigable star-map
templates.ref: Fauna Robotics spatial UI, node-graph star maps
templates.whenToUse: Present a body of work as an explorable star-field where each work is a glowing node and constellation lines group themes.
templates.signature: Pan and zoom a dark star-field of glowing work-nodes joined by constellation lines; hover a node for its prompt + thumbnail, click to lock and dim the rest; Canvas 2D, touch pan/pinch on mobile.

templates.title: FOLDWORK
templates.whenToUse: A case-study reel where each work creases and folds away like paper to reveal the next; tactile editorial papercraft, no WebGL.
templates.signature: Scroll-driven pure-CSS 3D diagonal fold: the upper triangle of each sheet rotates back around a corner hinge, a crease shadow tracing the fold and a cobalt paper underside revealing the next work.

templates.title: HALFTONE
templates.ref: Niccolo Fanton dithering shader (Codrops 2025), Game-Boy / e-ink
templates.palette: paper #e8e4d8 + ink #1a1a1a (the dither is the color system)
templates.whenToUse: An anti-AI-polish reel where every image and video is rendered live as a 1-bit ordered-dither grid; hover and click reveal the source.
templates.signature: A live WebGL Bayer-dither shader renders all media as a dense 1-bit pixel grid that brightens on cursor proximity and dissolves to full color on click; a Bayer-LUT texture keeps it GPU-robust.

templates.title: GENOPS CONSOLE
templates.palette: near-black green #080a09 + lime #c2f53e; cyan/amber/rose status; JetBrains Mono + Inter
templates.whenToUse: Present a media-gen reel to a technical or ops-minded audience as a live control surface: event ticker, latency/cost/throughput cards, fleet gauges, and a jobs table.
templates.signature: An expandable jobs table where clicking a row slides open a drawer that plays that job's generated asset next to its prompt, pipeline, cost and seed.

templates.title: SCATTER TABLE
templates.whenToUse: When a small curated set should feel like loose cards tossed on a table; the tactile drag-throw-and-pin interaction IS the gallery, no scroll.
templates.signature: Weighted drag-and-throw card physics with motion-direction tilt and soft wall bounces; click to pin a card full screen.

templates.title: BROADCAST TICKER
templates.whenToUse: Frame a media-gen gallery as a live trading floor: each render scrolls past as a clickable ticker slug that halts the tape and pulls a full quote card.
templates.signature: A continuous cursor-driven amber broadcast tape (push right to fast-forward, left to rewind, pure CSS) with a counter-running context-tag strip and a CRT scanline veil.

templates.title: ELASTIC RIBBON
templates.whenToUse: A small curated body of work (4 to 9 pieces) where the navigation itself is the hook: one tensioned cord the visitor drags and snaps through, no buttons or grid.
templates.signature: A single vermilion elastic cord runs the spine with polaroids pinned on alternating sides; dragging bows and tensions the cord, releasing snaps to the next work, with a live tension read-out.

templates.title: MORPHGRID
templates.whenToUse: When one continuous set of pieces should recompose itself between editorial framings (packed mosaic, single column, strip, radial fan) as the viewer scrolls.
templates.signature: A single set of cells physically reflows between four named formations (mosaic, editorial, strip, octagonal radial fan) driven purely by scroll position in one rAF loop, no animation library.

templates.title: INTERFACE NOSTALGIA OS
templates.ref: Milosz Chudy portfolio, Player Zero AI desktop UI
templates.palette: Win95 silver #c0c0c0 + navy #000080 title bars + teal #008080 desktop
templates.whenToUse: A mixed-media showcase where the interface itself is the wow: browsing means rummaging through draggable, minimisable, overlapping retro-OS app windows.
templates.signature: A Win95 desktop as a portfolio: each work is a draggable, minimisable, overlapping skeuomorphic app window with a taskbar button, a Start menu, and a right-click Cascade/Arrange menu.

templates.title: HOLODECK
templates.ref: holographic foil cards, FVCKRENDER iridescence, Bebas Neue Y3K
templates.palette: void purple #06000a + iridescent conic foil (magenta #ff2d78, cyan, violet, gold) + pale ink #f4ecff
templates.whenToUse: Showcase a small set of hero works (3-12) as collectible holographic foil cards with cursor/tilt shimmer and a lens-flare wipe between them.
templates.signature: A Y3K holographic trading-card display case: a hero work on a pure-CSS conic-gradient foil bezel whose hue rotates via @property and shifts with cursor delta (desktop) or device tilt (mobile).

templates.title: LIQUID GLASS DEPTH
templates.ref: Apple Liquid Glass WWDC 2026; Exo Ape Fluid Glass (CSS Design Awards 2026)
templates.palette: near-black #0d0d0f under a drifting gradient + ice-white translucent tint; blur and tint are the color system, no solid fills
templates.whenToUse: A small set of premium portfolio or product cards presented as depth-layered floating glass over rich media, where translucency, frosted blur and scroll parallax sell genuine spatial hierarchy.
templates.signature: Per-tier backdrop-filter blur (far 8px / mid 16px / near 26px) IS the depth system; hover clears a pane's frost toward zero and slides it forward, capped at 3 concurrent blurred panes for GPU budget.

templates.title: PASTED
templates.ref: Jackie Hu / KidCore collage 2026; Toilet Paper Barcelona
templates.whenToUse: A warm, hand-made, maximalist showcase where each work should feel physically taped onto a page rather than dropped into a clean grid.
templates.signature: Works look physically pasted down: torn-paper CSS clip-path edges held at a tilt by washi-tape strips, and hovering a card lifts it, straightens its rotation as if unsticking the tape, and deepens the shadow.

templates.title: PRESSURE
templates.ref: Obys Agency kinetic type 2026; AVA SRG variable type
templates.palette: off-white #f8f8f5 + ink #111; zero decorative colour, hierarchy from ink opacity
templates.whenToUse: A typography-only index or portfolio where the text itself is the navigation: no imagery in the frame, kinetic variable-font weight reacts to cursor and scroll velocity, works open full-screen on demand.
templates.signature: One variable font (Roboto Flex) does everything: cursor speed pumps the weight axis hairline-to-black and scroll velocity stretches the width axis, so the live type is the only interface.

templates.title: CONTROL ROOM
templates.palette: monitor-black + phosphor green #39ff14, lone red REC dot; colour from the feeds
templates.whenToUse: Present a small set (5 to 9) of image or video feeds as a live analogue security-monitor wall when you want a high-impact surveillance aesthetic.
templates.signature: An uneven 2+3+2 bank of CCTV tubes with VHS timestamps, scanlines and a shared single-rAF grain canvas; clicking a monitor maximises it with a CRT power-on zoom while the rest dim to grainy thumbnails.

templates.title: AXIS SHIFT
templates.palette: warm paper #f5f0e8 + ink #1c1815 + vermilion #c0392b; Fraunces + Space Grotesk
templates.whenToUse: A works index where vertical scroll pivots 90 degrees into a horizontal scroll-snap lane of full-bleed landscape stills and short loops.
templates.signature: A vermilion CSS-only 3D perspective tilt that visibly turns the floor 90 degrees as vertical scroll hands off to a native horizontal scroll-snap lane (no scroll hijacking).

templates.title: THE LONG READ
templates.ref: Adidas Annual Report sidebar (2026), SBS The Boat
templates.palette: deep navy #1a1a2e + chapter gold #e8c547 + paper ink; Fraunces + Spectral + Space Mono
templates.whenToUse: A long-form editorial case study where each work appears as inline evidence inside argued prose, with a persistent chapter index to jump around.
templates.signature: A position:sticky left rail of numbered chapter dots each ringed by a reading-progress arc (collapsing to a floating bottom dot-nav on phones), with a distinct CSS scroll-reveal per chapter and works set inline as evidence.

templates.title: BIOLUMINESCENT MESH
templates.palette: abyss black #030a12 + bioluminescent teal #00f5a0 + deep violet #8a2be2
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or studio gallery where dark frosted media cards float over a living deep-sea aurora that breathes and ripples to the cursor.
templates.signature: A full-viewport GLSL fragment-shader mesh gradient that breathes via sine displacement + arithmetic value-noise fbm and ripples like disturbed water under the cursor; frosted-glass work cards float in the glow.

templates.title: STAMP DECK
templates.palette: aged paper + postal ink + perforation gum + cancellation crimson
templates.whenToUse: Present works as collectible postage stamps in a philatelic catalogue, each with perforated edge, denomination and postmark, where hover magnifies through a loupe and click peels the stamp.
templates.signature: A cursor-following brass WebGL magnifying loupe (barrel distortion + edge chromatic aberration) over oversized perforated stamps, paired with a 3D corner-peel on click that curls the stamp back to expose the full-res piece.

templates.title: INK.RUN!
templates.ref: Ponpon Mania (Awwwards SOTM Oct 2025), Siena Film Foundation
templates.whenToUse: A generated-media or illustration portfolio that should read as a paced vertical manga/webtoon strip, each work a self-contained inked panel that breathes into view and taps open to a full splash.
templates.signature: Each work is an inked comic panel with a typewriter caption and a spot-red dialogue bubble; on scroll-in it breathes (CSS scale pulse) while a red speed-line sweeps once, only the centered video decodes, and tapping splashes it full-viewport with a perspective push.

templates.title: CREATIVE ATLAS
templates.ref: Codrops Scroll-Driven SVG Map Animations (2026), Floema Jewelry
templates.palette: cartographic navy #0f1923 + gold waypoints #c9a35b + parchment route #e8dcc4
templates.whenToUse: A 4 to 8 work portfolio narrated as a journey across a hand-drawn atlas, where each scroll step travels the route to the next golden waypoint that unfolds into a work.
templates.signature: A full-viewport hand-drawn inline-SVG atlas where scroll draws a gold-and-parchment route through golden waypoint markers, a vehicle dot riding the route tip, and the camera zooming into each marker as it unfolds the work into a paper dossier.

templates.title: UNFOLD GRID
templates.ref: Codrops Sticky Grid Scroll (2026), Dropbox Brand (CSSDA 2025)
templates.palette: bone #f3efe8 + ink + unlock-blue #2c6fad; Fraunces + Inter Tight + Space Mono
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or gated drop where work sits locked (blurred, padlocked) and unlocks one cell at a time as the visitor scrolls, spiralling out from the center.
templates.signature: A sticky-pinned grid where scroll drives one CSS custom property that unlocks cells one by one spiralling from the center outward, each snapping from blurred/desaturated/padlocked to sharp full-color with a brief blue flash ring.

templates.title: MOOD METER
templates.ref: Codrops Scroll-Reactive Mood Backgrounds (2026), Terminal Industries REJOUICE
templates.palette: near-black void + velocity hue cyan to amber to magenta; near-white frosted slabs
templates.whenToUse: A clean vertical gallery where scroll speed itself is the interaction: slow keeps the palette icy and slabs crisp, fast turns the background hot and cards hazy, with a live ENERGY HUD.
templates.signature: A single rAF loop measures the per-frame derivative of scroll position and drives one CSS custom property that moves everything at once: ambient hue (cold to hot), per-card frost blur up to 16px, label weight, and a fixed ENERGY arc gauge.

templates.title: BLIND WIPE
templates.ref: Codrops SVG Mask Transitions on Scroll (2026), Cyd Stumpel (Awwwards SOTD 2025)
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or lookbook where each work should arrive with a tactile mask-reveal as it scrolls into view, the wipe itself being the brand.
templates.signature: Black SVG blind panels retract row-by-row to uncover each work while a vermilion seam stays lit along the retracting edge, cycling four wipe patterns; the first work is frozen mid-wipe at scroll=0 so the thumbnail shows the move.

templates.title: GLYPH FIELD
templates.palette: near-black #0d0d0d + bone type #f0ece4; proximity ramp ice-blue #90c8f0 to deep-red #c0392b
templates.whenToUse: A typographic portfolio index where the whole first screen is a living variable-font specimen and works hide beneath the type, parted open by clicking a glyph cluster.
templates.signature: A dense grid of one repeated glyph where each cell's distance to the focal point (7 concentric rings) drives its weight axis (120 to 980) and hue, baking a cursor-shaped pressure depression into the type; one rAF loop, no WebGL.

templates.title: NEVER-ENDING PARALLAX
templates.ref: Codrops The Never Ending Story (2026), Infinite Parallax Grid
templates.palette: deep void #06060a + ember #ff6b35 (loop indicator) + off-white ink
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio that should feel boundless: works orbit forever across three parallax depth layers, the scroll never bottoms out, a corner LOOP counter the only sign it is circular.
templates.signature: One rAF loop advances a scalar; three depth layers (blurred bg, lit mid focus, sharp fg) render at per-layer factors and every panel wraps via positive-modulo so the last item silently teleports to the front, no duplicated DOM, no flash.

templates.title: SOUNDSCAPE REACTIVE
templates.ref: Codrops Audio-Reactive Web Audio API; CSS Design Awards visualizers
templates.palette: void #080808 + cyan bars #00e5ff + magenta peak caps #ff2d78
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or showreel where each work carries its own sound signature and a frequency-bar column breathes with audio (per-card loop, synth, or live mic), one focused work locked and playing.
templates.signature: Per-card real-time Canvas equalizer driven by a Web Audio AnalyserNode (FFT 2048, smoothing 0.85, no WebGL): cyan bars with a magenta peak cap riding the loudest band, alive and varied at scroll=0 via a suspended-safe ambient oscillator bank.

templates.title: TUMBLE REEL
templates.ref: Codrops Exploring 3D Image Rotations on Scroll (2026), Lusion
templates.palette: near-black #0c0c0c + bone matte #f0ece4; works are the only color
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or capsule-drop where each work should tumble through a 3D wave path on scroll and rest flat and sharp at center, a tactile pure-CSS 3D feel without WebGL.
templates.signature: Each work translates on Y, rotates on X and Z, and scales down a sine-wave Z-depth path, snapping to a flat sharp rest at viewport center before tumbling out; per-card easing makes no two alike, with a hero stack of three tumbling cards framed at scroll=0.

templates.title: INFINITE IMAGE TUBE
templates.ref: Codrops Reactive Depth 3D Image Tube (2026), Lusion Three.js inertia
templates.palette: void black #050505 + lime chrome #c8f53e; images supply all interior color
templates.whenToUse: Present a body of work wrapped on the outer face of an endlessly spinning WebGL cylinder where scroll or drag adds spin, inertia carries it, and only the front-facing plane is fully sharp.
templates.signature: Real image planes placed by trig on a 3D cylinder's outer face, the front plane sharp and lime-lit while side planes curve away into shader perspective blur; scroll/drag injects rotational velocity and inertia dampens it, the ring wrapping seamlessly at a full turn.
